roa.docketEntryComment: Order - MVARS (Mobile Video Audio Recording Systems) Protective Order
Motion -  Motion for Misdemeanor Diversion Pursuant to PC 1001.95
Defendant Cancels the Interpreter for All Purposes
DEF NOTICE OF ENROLLMENT TO DUI PROGRAM RECEIVED

/FTRRECORDED/CAL:DIVERSION HEARING PURS 1001,95/INTC/X:1 AA MEETING PERWEEK PROVIDED/X:THE COURT ISSUES TENTATIVE RULING ON DIVERSION REQUEST, HOWEVER,  THE COURT CANNOT GRANT THIS REQUEST UNTIL THE LEGISLATURE CLARIFIESITS INTENT WITH RESPECT TO THE AVAILABILITY OF DIVERSION FOR MISDEMEANOR DUI DEFENDANTS UNDER PENAL CODESECTION 1001,95 OR THE CALIFORNIA SUPREME COURT REVERSES THE RULINGS IN TANAND GRASSI,/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/DOPU:PROOF OF 1 AA MEETING PER WEEK PROVIDED/

/FTRRECORDED/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURR,/GTWM/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO ATTEND 1AA MEETING PER WEEK/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/DOPU:PROOF OF 1 AA PER WEEK/MVARS/
/CAL:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/FTRRECORDED/DAWT/X:FACT SHEET SUBMITTED TO THE COURT/CONTD:TO SET/DOPU:PROOF OF 1 AA PER WEEK/
